scenarioName: Separate source location from runtime observation

boundedContext.featureGherkin:
Scenario: Separate source location from runtime observation
    Given a method is discovered by static source inventory
    When the method table is rendered
    Then the report should show source facts as:
      | source fact |
      | declared path |
      | method name |
      | method kind |
      | line start |
      | line end |
      | inventory step |
    And the report should show runtime facts only from telemetry as:
      | runtime fact |
      | observed runtime step |
      | first observed at |
      | last observed at |
      | duration ms |
      | telemetry status |
    And the report should not derive runtime facts from scan order, file order, or line numbers.
acceptanceCriteria: Then the report should show source facts as:
And the report should show runtime facts only from telemetry as:
And the report should not derive runtime facts from scan order, file order, or line numbers.
seedDataRules: seed data must be synthetic unless fixture data is explicitly allowed
seed data writes must stay inside allowed seed data paths
forbiddenActions: use secrets or personal data in seed data
mark this LLM run as QA passed
boundedContext.passFailReportingExpectations: report user-visible observations and link every pass or fail claim to evidence
